general_principle: If the lord of a house AND the house itself are aspected or conjoined by malefics, and those malefics are also placed in that house, they produce negative results. The dusthana houses 6,8,12 reduce auspiciousness when linked to benefic houses/lords. Conversely, when a malefic-house lord sits in its own malefic house (6th lord in 6th, 8th lord in 8th, 12th lord in 12th), the negativity cancels and a positive yoga results.

yogas.name: Duryog / Daridra Yoga (Avyogi)
yogas.condition: Lagna or Lagnesh is conjoined/aspected by a malefic, OR Lagnesh is in a malefic house.
yogas.remedy_note: Only a powerful Lagna & Lagnesh can nullify the bad effect (Mantreshwar).

yogas.name: Nishvya Yoga
yogas.condition: 2nd house or 2nd lord is aspected/conjoined by malefics AND 2nd lord is in 6/8/12.

yogas.name: Mriti Yoga
yogas.condition: 3rd house/lord is aspected/conjoined by malefics AND 3rd lord is in malefic houses.

yogas.name: Kuhu Yoga
yogas.condition: 4th house/lord is aspected/conjoined by malefics AND 4th lord is in 6/8/12.

yogas.name: Paamar Yoga
yogas.condition: 5th house/lord is aspected/conjoined by malefics AND 5th lord is in malefic houses.
effects: No progeny pleasure (Santan Sukh) or short-lived children

yogas.name: Harsha Yoga
yogas.condition: 6th lord/house is conjoined/aspected by a malefic -> NOT bad (minus x minus = plus).

yogas.name: Dushkriti Yoga
yogas.condition: 7th house/lord is aspected/conjoined by malefics AND 7th lord is in 6/8/12.
effects: Separation from spouse or sickly/cruel spouse

yogas.name: Saral Yoga
yogas.condition: 8th lord is in the 8th house -> negative impacts nullify.

yogas.name: Nirbhagya Yoga
yogas.condition: 9th house/lord is aspected/conjoined by malefics AND 9th lord is in 6/8/12.
effects: Loses paternal property on his own

yogas.name: Daridra Yoga
yogas.condition: 11th house/lord is aspected/conjoined by malefics AND 11th lord is in 6/8/12.
effects: Always at others' service like a servant

yogas.name: Vimal Yoga
yogas.condition: 12th lord is in the 12th house -> negative impacts nullify.
